title: StellarMC Enhanced
description: Enhanced Edition of the StellarMC Base Modpack, which includes Quality-of-Life mods.
body:
### StellarMC Enhanced
This updated modpack is perfect for players looking to enhance their StellarMC experience. In addition to improved performance, our Enhanced edition includes quality-of-life mods.

### 🔧Included mods:
- Sodium (Base)
- Lithium (Base)
- Fabric API (Base)
- Entity Culling (Base)
- FerriteCore (Base)
- ImmediatelyFast (Base)
- Simple Voice Chat
- Iris Shaders
- Litematica
- Mod Menu
- Shulker Box Tooltips
- Zoom
- Chat Heads
- Indium
- MaLiLib
- Skin Layers
- Lamb Dynamic Lights
- Freecam Fair Play
